calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms Under Probate Code Section 15409 (Prob Code Sec 17200(B)(13))
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Loebner for Petitioner.

Ms. Loebner explained the need for a Special Needs Trust, the Beneficiary's medical condition/needs, MediCal requirements and addressed the Court's concerns. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust Terms was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
